goals: Explore the project structure to understand what kind of codebase this is
Find files related to post-Soviet state symbols, flags, or heraldry
Search for specific content about particular symbols or coat of arms from post-Soviet states

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and methodical. Prefers systematic exploration before diving into specifics. Uses precise terminology from their domain.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in vexillology and heraldry but has no technical background. Understands general file organization concepts but does not know tool names or command syntax. Will need guidance on how to search effectively.

end_condition: The user has explored the project structure, identified relevant files containing post-Soviet state symbols or flags, and found specific content about particular heraldic elements they were researching.
